title: Journey Through Tanzania's Wilderness

scenes.text: The Serengeti hosts the world's greatest wildlife spectacle each year.
Located in northern Tanzania, it is one of the most famous national parks.
The Great Migration involves over two million animals moving in search of greener pastures.
scenes.query: Serengeti National Park great migration numbers

scenes.text: Encounter lions, elephants, zebras, and more in their natural habitat.
scenes.label: DIVERSE WILDLIFE

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Serengeti National Park, Mara Region - Tanzania. A haven for wildlife lovers, witnessing the Great Migration. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
